default.description: Default page and section background surface.

medium.description: Slightly elevated surface, used for cards, panels, and containers on the default background.

strong.description: High emphasis surface, used for nested containers or hover states on medium backgrounds.

default.description: Default text and icon colour on light canvas surfaces.

muted.description: De-emphasised text and icons at 70% opacity, for secondary content on canvas.

subtle.description: Subtle text and icons at 50% opacity, for placeholder or tertiary content on canvas.

strong.description: High contrast border for dividers, table edges, and prominent outlines on canvas.

subtle.description: Medium weight border for card outlines, input fields, and section dividers on canvas.

muted.description: Lightest border for subtle separators and de-emphasised outlines on canvas.

default.description: Default dark background surface for inverse sections and dark mode.

medium.description: Slightly lighter dark surface for cards and containers on the inverse background.

strong.description: High emphasis dark surface, used for nested containers on the inverse background.

default.description: Default text and icon colour on dark/inverse canvas surfaces.

muted.description: De-emphasised text and icons at 80% opacity for secondary content on inverse canvas.

subtle.description: Subtle text and icons at 50% opacity for placeholder or tertiary content on inverse canvas.

strong.description: High contrast border for dividers and prominent outlines on inverse canvas.

subtle.description: Medium weight border for card outlines and section dividers on inverse canvas.

muted.description: Lightest border for subtle separators and de-emphasised outlines on inverse canvas.

low.description: Low intensity primary brand accent, for tinted backgrounds and subtle brand moments.

default.description: Default primary brand accent colour for brand highlights and decorative elements.

strong.description: High intensity primary brand accent for bold brand moments and strong visual emphasis.

default.description: Default foreground on primary brand accent fill.

muted.description: De-emphasised foreground on primary brand accent, for secondary text or icons.

subtle.description: Subtle foreground on primary brand accent, for tertiary text or icons.

low.description: Low intensity secondary brand accent, for tinted backgrounds and subtle brand moments.

default.description: Default secondary brand accent colour for brand highlights and decorative elements.

strong.description: High intensity secondary brand accent for bold brand moments and strong visual emphasis.

default.description: Default foreground on secondary brand accent fill.

muted.description: De-emphasised foreground on secondary brand accent, for secondary text or icons.

subtle.description: Subtle foreground on secondary brand accent, for tertiary text or icons.

default.description: Primary CTA button background. Branded, highest emphasis.

hover.description: Primary CTA button background on hover.

pressed.description: Primary CTA button background on press.

disabled.description: Primary CTA button background when disabled.

default.description: Primary CTA button fg. Always on brand fill.

hover.description: Primary CTA button fg on hover.

pressed.description: Primary CTA button fg on press.

disabled.description: Primary CTA button fg when disabled.

default.description: Primary CTA button has no border.

hover.description: Primary CTA button has no border on hover.

pressed.description: Primary CTA button has no border on press.

disabled.description: Primary CTA button has no border when disabled.

default.description: Solid button background. High emphasis neutral fill.

hover.description: Solid button background on hover.

pressed.description: Solid button background on press.

disabled.description: Solid button background when disabled.

default.description: Solid button fg. Always on dark fill, always near-white.

hover.description: Solid button fg on hover.

pressed.description: Solid button fg on press.

disabled.description: Solid button fg when disabled.

default.description: Solid button has no border.

hover.description: Solid button has no border on hover.

pressed.description: Solid button has no border on press.

disabled.description: Solid button has no border when disabled.

default.description: Subtle button resting background. Light tinted fill to distinguish from ghost.

hover.description: Subtle button background on hover.

pressed.description: Subtle button background on press.

disabled.description: Subtle button background when disabled.

default.description: Subtle button fg. Sits on canvas or subtle fill, always near-black.

hover.description: Subtle button fg on hover.

pressed.description: Subtle button fg on press.

disabled.description: Subtle button fg when disabled.

default.description: Subtle button border. Outline style, near-black stroke.

hover.description: Subtle button border on hover.

pressed.description: Subtle button border on press.

disabled.description: Subtle button border when disabled.

default.description: Ghost button resting background. Always transparent.

hover.description: Ghost button background on hover. Barely-there fill.

pressed.description: Ghost button background on press.

disabled.description: Ghost button background when disabled.

default.description: Ghost button fg. Sits directly on canvas, always near-black.

hover.description: Ghost button fg on hover.

pressed.description: Ghost button fg on press.

disabled.description: Ghost button fg when disabled.

default.description: Ghost button has no border.

hover.description: Ghost button has no border on hover.

pressed.description: Ghost button has no border on press.

disabled.description: Ghost button has no border when disabled.

default.description: High emphasis text or icon. Ghost button label, icon button, high emphasis link.

hover.description: High emphasis text or icon on hover.

pressed.description: High emphasis text or icon on press.

disabled.description: High emphasis text or icon when disabled.

default.description: Medium emphasis text or icon. Nav links, tab labels, supporting actions.

hover.description: Medium emphasis text or icon on hover.

pressed.description: Medium emphasis text or icon on press.

disabled.description: Medium emphasis text or icon when disabled.

default.description: Low emphasis text or icon. Breadcrumbs, footer links, metadata, de-emphasised actions.

hover.description: Low emphasis text or icon on hover.

pressed.description: Low emphasis text or icon on press.

disabled.description: Low emphasis text or icon when disabled.

default.description: Branded text or icon. Inline text links, branded interactive elements.

hover.description: Branded text or icon on hover.

pressed.description: Branded text or icon on press.

disabled.description: Branded text or icon when disabled.

default.description: Subtle button resting background. Light tinted fill to distinguish from ghost.

hover.description: Subtle button background on hover.

pressed.description: Subtle button background on press.

disabled.description: Subtle button background when disabled.

default.description: Subtle button fg. Sits on canvas or subtle fill, always near-black.

hover.description: Subtle button fg on hover.

pressed.description: Subtle button fg on press.

disabled.description: Subtle button fg when disabled.

default.description: Subtle button border. Outline style, near-black stroke.

hover.description: Subtle button border on hover.

pressed.description: Subtle button border on press.

disabled.description: Subtle button border when disabled.

hover.description: Primary CTA button background on hover, on dark surface. Steps lighter.

pressed.description: Primary CTA button background on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Primary CTA button background when disabled, on dark surface.

hover.description: Primary CTA button fg on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Primary CTA button fg on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Primary CTA button fg when disabled, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Primary CTA button has no border on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Primary CTA button has no border when disabled, on dark surface.

default.description: Solid button background on dark surface. White fill for contrast.

hover.description: Solid button background on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Solid button background on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Solid button background when disabled, on dark surface.

default.description: Solid button fg on dark surface. Always on white fill, always near-black.

pressed.description: Solid button fg on press, on dark surface.

hover.description: Subtle button background on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Subtle button background on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Subtle button background when disabled, on dark surface.

default.description: Subtle button fg on dark surface. Near-white for contrast.

hover.description: Subtle button fg on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Subtle button fg on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Subtle button fg when disabled, on dark surface.

hover.description: Subtle button border on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Subtle button border on press, on dark surface.

default.description: Ghost button resting background on dark surface. Always transparent.

hover.description: Ghost button background on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Ghost button background on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Ghost button background when disabled, on dark surface.

default.description: Ghost button fg on dark surface. Sits directly on dark canvas, near-white.

hover.description: Ghost button fg on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Ghost button fg on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Ghost button fg when disabled, on dark surface.

default.description: Ghost button has no border, on dark surface.

hover.description: Ghost button has no border on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Ghost button has no border on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Ghost button has no border when disabled, on dark surface.

default.description: High emphasis text or icon on dark surface. Ghost button label, icon button, high emphasis link.

hover.description: High emphasis text or icon on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: High emphasis text or icon on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: High emphasis text or icon when disabled, on dark surface.

default.description: Medium emphasis text or icon on dark surface. Nav links, tab labels.

hover.description: Medium emphasis text or icon on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Medium emphasis text or icon on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Medium emphasis text or icon when disabled, on dark surface.

default.description: Low emphasis text or icon on dark surface. Breadcrumbs, footer links, metadata.

hover.description: Low emphasis text or icon on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Low emphasis text or icon on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Low emphasis text or icon when disabled, on dark surface.

default.description: Branded text or icon on dark surface. Lightened for legibility.

hover.description: Branded text or icon on hover, on dark surface.

pressed.description: Branded text or icon on press, on dark surface.

disabled.description: Branded text or icon when disabled, on dark surface.

dark.value: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, {color.primary.500} 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, {color.secondary.500} 0%, transparent 50%), {color.neutral-tonal.1600}

light.value: radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 20%, {color.primary.500} 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, {color.secondary.500} 0%, transparent 50%), {color.neutral-tonal.100}
